data.title: Thermacell Repellents selected to 2025 Fortune Best Workplaces in Manufacturing & Production list for the first time.
data.description: In Bedford, Massachusetts on September 12, 2025, Thermacell Repellents, Inc. was announced by Great Place To Work® and Fortune magazine as part of the 2025 Fortune Best Workplaces in Manufacturing & Production™ List. It marks Thermacell's inaugural inclusion in this esteemed list in the category of small & medium-sized enterprises.

data.title: RISE Festival announces schedule for 10th anniversary in Mojave Desert. Last chance for tickets on Oct 3–5, 2025.
data.description: The complete schedule for performances at the landmark 10th anniversary of RISE Festival has been disclosed, with the last opportunity to buy tickets being available from October 3-5, 2025. The event will take place in the Mojave Desert, Las Vegas. Interested individuals can find more information and purchase tickets at www.RISEfestival.com. This announcement was made on September 12, 2025.

data.title: Growatt showcased solar and storage innovations at RE+ 2025 in Las Vegas, on September 9–11.
data.description: From September 9 to 11, 2025, Growatt, a top supplier of distributed solar and energy storage solutions (ESS), wrapped up its involvement at RE+ 2025, the biggest clean energy event in North America, in Las Vegas. During the event, Growatt had a successful presence and engaged with a significant number of attendees.

data.title: Jackery debuts HomePower 3600 Plus at RE+ 2025, a new flagship model, alongside EHB lineup. Major event.
data.description: In Las Vegas on September 12, 2025, Jackery, a prominent company specializing in solar generators and renewable energy solutions, captivated audiences at RE+ 2025 by unveiling its latest flagship product, the HomePower 3600 Plus. This new addition to the lineup complements the full Essential Home Backup (EHB) range, demonstrating Jackery's commitment to providing comprehensive residential power solutions.

data.title: Asia-Pacific E-Commerce & Payments Market Report 2025-2028 explores B2C, B2B, Digital Payments, AI role. Data insights added.
data.description: Recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, the report titled "Asia-Pacific E-Commerce & Payments 2025" offers comprehensive insights on the region. This report delves into B2C and B2B E-Commerce, along with digital payments innovations, adoption trends, and changing dynamics. It analyzes various aspects including consumer behavior, merchant acceptance rates, and payment choices. Additionally, the report explores the regulatory framework and the impact of AI on commerce in the Asia-Pacific region.

data.title: Nonprofit Homewise receives $30K grant from FHLB Dallas to assist Street Food Institute; helps food service businesses.
data.description: In Albuquerque, New Mexico, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) and Homewise will be commemorating the allocation of a $30,000 Partnership Grant Program (PGP) grant to Street Food Institute. The celebration will take place at 9:00 a.m. (MT) on Friday, September 19, 2025, through a ceremonial check presentation. Street Food Institute, established over ten years ago, aims to assist individuals in achieving their goal of owning and managing a prosperous food service enterprise. The institute provides online classes, practical training, and support to aspiring entrepreneurs.

data.title: Dow falls 200 points, consumer sentiment drops to 55.4 in September. Dow at 45,904.50, NASDAQ at 22,134.26. S&P 500 at 6,587.98.
data.description: Midway through the trading day, U.S. stocks showed a mixed performance, with the Dow Jones index dropping over 200 points on Friday. The Dow was down 0.44% at 45,904.50, while the NASDAQ saw a 0.41% increase to 22,134.26. The S&P 500 also experienced a slight rise, gaining 0.01% to 6,587.98. Utility shares surged by 0.5%, while materials stocks fell by 0.6%. The University of Michigan consumer sentiment index dropped to 55.4 in September from 58 in August, falling short of market estimates. Allied Gaming & Entertainment Inc. (NASDAQ: AGAE) shares showed significant growth, climbing 113% to $1.9501 following the company's announcement of an initial investment in Bitcoin and Ethereum.

data.title: ZIPS Car Wash upgrades continue in Knoxville with 4 more locations renovated, offering free car washes on Sept 16.
data.description: A month ago, ZIPS revealed the Re-Grand Opening of five ZIPS Car Wash sites in Knoxville, followed by the renovation of four additional locations. These newly revamped locations will offer complimentary car washes on Tuesday, September 16th. The Knoxville Chamber of Commerce will collaborate with ZIPS for the second time to showcase the upgraded facilities. The Ribbon Cutting Ceremony is set for Tuesday at 11 am at 29. The renovation initiative aims to benefit local military families through academic scholarships.

data.title: Coinbase demands court action after SEC deleted over a year of Gensler's texts. Alleges FOIA violation.
data.description: Coinbase has filed a lawsuit against the SEC regarding the disappearance of approximately one year's worth of ex-Chairman Gary Gensler's text messages. The cryptocurrency exchange accuses the agency of violating FOIA regulations by failing to fulfill requests for the texts.

data.title: Spotify stock struggles after mixed Q2 report, awaits price hikes and new superfan tier. - 81 characters
data.description: Since its second-quarter report in late July, Spotify's stock has faced challenges in sustaining its growth. The company seems to be holding out for potential price increases and the introduction of a new subscription tier aimed at super fans.

data.title: IonQ, top acquisitive in quantum computing stocks, showcases strategy at analyst day, as per Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: IonQ, a prominent company in the quantum computing industry, emphasized its acquisition strategy during an analyst day session. The company is known for being highly active in acquiring other businesses within the quantum computing sector. This development underscores IonQ's commitment to growth and innovation in the industry. This news was shared on Investor's Business Daily following the event.

data.title: Arista stock declined after analyst day discussing company's 2026 revenue target, AI growth outlook.
data.description: Arista's shares experienced a decline as analysts assessed the company's revenue goal for 2026, guidance related to artificial intelligence, and financial targets over the next three years. The stock witnessed a reversal downwards following an Analyst Day presentation highlighting the projected growth in AI.

data.title: University of Phoenix will host webinar on balancing career, caregiving & identity in today's workforce on Sept. 18.
data.description: Phoenix-based University of Phoenix is set to conduct the upcoming session of its Bridging Perspectives webinar series titled “Balancing Career, Caregiving & Identity in Today’s Workforce.” The webinar will take place on Thursday, September 18 at 12 PM MDT. Hosted by the Office of Collaborative Learning and Educational Engagement, this series is tailored for a wide audience including higher education leaders, employers, nonprofit organizations, and members of the University of Phoenix community – faculty, staff, students, and alumni. The discussion will delve into the challenges and strategies surrounding caregiving in the modern workforce.
